name: storyboard-monorepo
description: Root orchestrator for apps/web (Node, deploys to Railway), apps/voice-service (Python/Spark-TTS, deploys to Modal), and apps/alignment-service (Python/WhisperX, local dev only). No dependencies of its own -- see apps/web/package.json, apps/voice-service/requirements.txt, and apps/alignment-service/requirements.txt.

scripts.start: trap 'kill 0' INT TERM EXIT; npm run dev:web & npm run dev:voice & npm run dev:align & wait
scripts.check: npm --prefix apps/web run check && apps/voice-service/venv/bin/python -m py_compile apps/voice-service/main.py && apps/alignment-service/venv/bin/python -m py_compile apps/alignment-service/main.py
scripts.test: npm --prefix apps/web test && apps/voice-service/venv/bin/python -m pytest apps/voice-service/test_main.py && apps/alignment-service/venv/bin/python -m pytest apps/alignment-service/test_main.py
